violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Chips were found stored on the floor. Food items should be stored at least 6 inches off of the floor.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Observed hot dogs thawing in warm, standing water in the middle compartment of the 3 compartment sink. Discussed using cold running water in the sanitizing section of the 3 compartment sink for thawing food items.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the reach-in refrigerator and microwaves were found dirty. Nacho cheese dispenser also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
